objective:
FICHE_STRATEGIE v1
id: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
archetype: mean_reversion_bollinger_rsi
family: mean_reversion
timeframe: 1h
side: both
indicators:
- bollinger(period=49, std_dev=2.1)
- rsi(period=8)
- atr(period=14)
entry:
- long: close < bollinger.lower and rsi < 25
- short: close > bollinger.upper and rsi > 60
exit:
- condition: close crosses bollinger.middle or rsi crosses 50
risk:
stop_atr_mult: 1.75
tp_atr_mult: 2.5
description: ATR stop-loss (1.75x) and take-profit (2.5x)
constraints:
- no_lookahead: true
- only_registry_indicators: true

iterations.hypothesis: The combination of Bollinger Bands and RSI can provide a good entry signal for mean reversion strategy in the given timeframe.
Combining Bollinger Bands and RSI will allow the strategy to identify mean reversion points for ADAUSDC when it is oversold or overbought, along with confirming trend strength.
